Package gui

package gui
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    gui.board
     
    gui.card
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BoardView
    The main container for the game's graphical user interface.
    ChallengeView
    Represents the graphical interface for the Challenge phase.
    DeckView
    Represents the graphical interface for viewing the game deck.
    DiceView
    Handles the visual animation and display of dice rolls on the game board.
    GameUI
    The main entry point for the "Rise of Runeterra" graphical user interface.
    Launcher
    A separate launcher class used to start the JavaFX application.
    ModifierView
    Handles the visual interface for the Modifier Phase.
